name: range-slider
title: Slider
description: Draggable range control with gradient fill and spring thumb.
docs:
# Slider
Draggable range control with gradient fill and spring thumb.
## Import
```tsx
import { Slider } from "@/components/ui/range-slider";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Slider value={50} min={0} max={100} value={50} />
```
## Props
- **value** (number) — default: `50`: Value
- **min** (number) — default: `0`: Minimum
- **max** (number) — default: `100`: Maximum
- **value** (string) — default: `50`: Value
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add range-slider
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/range-slider
```
